---
title: "Evals"
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
toc: false
css:
  - ../listing/listing.css
  - evals.css
resources:
  - evals.json
  - evals-filter.js
  - ../listing/listing.js
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script type="module" src="./evals-app.js"></script>
aliases:
  - /examples.html
  - /examples/index.html
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<div id="evals-app" class="listing-app" data-src="./evals.json"></div>
:::
